    swapinfo.8: Mention BLOCKSIZE in the ENVIRONMENT section

    Copy the ENVIRONMENT section from df(1) to swapinfo(8), except
    that the --si option is removed for swapinfo.

    PR:             235225

    MFC after:      3 days
